title: Violation-awareness gate now under-attributes O-B/O-C
evidence: IND-04 (PT) and IND-10 (EN) with explicit known-rule+awareness+conscious prose returned objective=null
expected_behavior: Conscious deviation with awareness should reach O-B
actual_behavior: Triad AND-gate + axis-evidence routing abstains on natural awareness prose
impact: Real violations missed; reviewer must supply O-B manually
recommended_action: Relax to require awareness+conscious (rule inferable) or broaden awareness lexicon; add real-narrative tests

title: Guardrail violations have no first-class UI surface
evidence: grep guardrail in app/**/*.tsx = 0; violations only appear as GUARDRAIL_VIOLATED_* text in warnings list
expected_behavior: Reviewers see a labelled guardrail panel with triggering evidence
actual_behavior: Violations buried in generic warnings; absent from common flow
recommended_action: Add dedicated guardrail panel rendering engine_output.guardrails + guardrailEvidence

title: vNext canonical response not renderable by common analyze UI
evidence: canonical branch returns seraAnalysis:null + different shape; common UI consumes seraAnalysis
expected_behavior: Common flow renders vNext candidate output
actual_behavior: Enabling flag for common users yields unrenderable response
impact: Common-flow pilot not viable; admin path only
recommended_action: Build common-flow vNext renderer or restrict pilot to admin path

title: audit_log writes are best-effort and can silently drop
evidence: writeAuditLog catches insert error and only console.error
actual_behavior: Failed audit inserts do not fail request nor alert
recommended_action: Treat vNext domain events as system-of-record; add alerting on audit failures

title: Validation corpus shares lexicon with engine
evidence: Narratives authored with concepts.ts terms; manifest freezes expected codes only
expected_behavior: Independent gold set authored before/independent of engine lexicon
actual_behavior: Validation proves lexical consistency not accuracy
recommended_action: Author frozen real-narrative PT/EN gold set labelled by experts

title: Designated closure record is stale vs code
evidence: Matrix marks F-03/F-04/F-05/F-21 partial/not-resolved while code resolves them
impact: Decisions made on false readiness data
recommended_action: Reconcile closure matrix with code before pilot sign-off

title: abstention_precision metric is mislabeled
evidence: Denominator mixes notCode CORRECT_ABSTENTION; numerator only kind:abstention; yields 0.2143
recommended_action: Redefine precision over abstention-expected only or remove
